hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT freeform.FreeFormFACILITY freeFormFacilityName FROM cabinet..ROI_FreeFormFacilityLOV freeform WHERE freeform.Created_By_Seq = :createdBy

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_FreeFormFacilityLOV ( FreeFormFACILITY, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Record_Version)
VALUES (:freeFormFacilityName, :createdDt, :createdBy, :modifiedDt, :modifiedBy, :recordVersion); select SCOPE_IDENTITY() as freeformFacilityId;

SELECT freeform.ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq id, freeform.FreeFormFACILITY freeFormFacilityName, freeform.Created_Dt createdDt, freeform.Created_By_Seq createdBy, freeform.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, freeform.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, freeform.Record_Version recordVersion
FROM cabinet..ROI_FreeFormFacilityLOV freeform WHERE freeform.FreeFormFACILITY = :freeFormFacilityName AND freeform.Created_By_Seq = :createdBy
